review_text: A really impressive family run camp site with a variety of facilities including well maintained pool, tennis, basketball courts, playgrounds & putt-putt. We had a powered site with an en suite which was also excellently maintained and very spacious. A very nice place to stay.
What a great place. Took a look around several top quality cabins. Fantastic play equipment for the kids and a great looking pool.

I was really looking forward to booking a few days at Amber Lee Holiday Home in the Peninsula over the Christmas period with my family. I completely understand that this time of year gets busy and places book out quickly, but it would be much more helpful if the website could show booked-out dates clearly instead of asking people to call in for availability.
When I called, the experience was far from professional. The person who answered didn’t greet me or introduce the business — just a blunt “yes.” I explained that the website asked customers to call to check availability, and before I could even finish providing the dates, she cut me off with “no, we’re booked.” That was it! no apology, no offer to suggest alternate dates or properties, no customer service at all.
It’s disappointing that a business dealing with guests year-round has such poor front-line service. A little courtesy goes a long way, especially when you’re the first point of contact for potential guests.
I’m not naming the staff member, in case this impacts your job. But genuinely, if customer service isn’t your thing, it might be worth finding a role better suited to your strengths. For the business, please do better. First impressions matter, and this one was not great.

We love staying at Amberlee. We had a powered ensuite site for our motorhome. The ensuite was perfect and the grounds were immaculate. The staff are the friendliest you will come across. Keep up the great work.
Fantastic holiday park. Has heaps to do for kids, short drive to the beach and the centre of Rosebud !

This place is awesome for family and kids. Totally over exceeded our expectations. The place was newly renovated and had everything for a quick getaway.
King bed was comfortable and clean, bunk beds also clean and comfortable mattress.
Shower/toilet fridge etc all super clean.
Our daughter loved all the activities available which kept her entertained for the trip. There’s about 4 playgrounds/huge sand pit/mini golf and an awesome pool with water features.
Staff are layed back and very accommodating.  Definitely coming back. Thanks heaps for looking after us and will see you again shortly. Danae and Steve.
We had a great time here - good family vibes at the pool.
This is a great park close to all amenities and facilities would definitely stay here again

It doesn’t get much better than this I’ve been coming to the peninsula for over 17 years, and Amberlee’s just keeps getting better and better.  Since last visited as RV campers they have added several camping spots with amazing ensuite bathrooms. We were amazed to see a new outdoor pool, splash park for the kids a rope adventure playground. 🤯 the kids made us stop so they could jump out before we even arrived at our site. The General manager and her team run a beautiful park and always on hand when we locked our keys in in bathroom at night🙄.

This is NOT a campsite. Do not book to stay here in an RV or campervan or tent. It has over 50 sites of which all but 4 have been built on. There is no toilet block, instead the 4 sites have ensuite facilities at a high additional cost. Our site is squished between a bungalow/static and and bungalow/static building site with all the wood/boards etc on the floor in front. I've seen better parking spaces at Woolworths.

I suspect our neighbours are equally displeased at seeing us!

Stop selling touring pitches - you are no longer a touring site.

Oh and obviously no WiFi .

Extremely disappointed

A terrific Accomodation  Venue in Rosebuds' Green belt , Dogs are  permitted On-site, theres a Swimming Pool,new Water Jets ,Childrens large Play Area ,lots of Green Spaces to relax ,a quick drive to the Beach ,Shops nearby also Family owned and operated
Very welcoming. Clean, comfortable accommodation that had everything needed to enjoy a relaxing break.  A quiet location

When visiting the Mornington Peninsula you must stay at Amberlee Caravan park

to take full advantage of the best on offer for the Mornington Peninsula

please Contact Amber or one of her professional team to arrange your visit

when visiting the Mornington Peninsula you deserve the best results for you and your family

please contact Amberlee family holiday park

thankyou

Byron Gales

Would strongly recommend this holiday park for anyone visiting the Mornington area.

Our cabin was so good! (Ask for #4). The entertainment facilities on offer really have the wow factor. My kids and I were entertained with multiple activities on offer.
Pools a tad fresh and Internet is a bit iffy but that is nit picking. We LOVED it and will be back.
Lovely Caravan Park, we had a great stay. Super clean.

I’m staying here right now. Absolutely gorgeous ppl here. Both reception and residents.
Caters for chldn and old cogers like me.
My daughter and I r loving every minute of it. My daughter has had such a traumatic year this year. So, I pulled her out school to go on a mental health break. And, I gotta say. This is the place to go! So, thank you staff and residents for making my holiday a great one!! 💕😊
